Grid.TextBlock:
1. 상황: The capture of Attu Island in the Pacific has solidified our successes against NATO and the Americans. Now we must conduct a final strike to demonstrate our unwavering resolve. Command has ordered us to sweep the American forces at the GIUK Gap aside and proceed into the Atlantic. Intel has identified an American carrier battle group in the area. Destroying this battle group, or at least driving it off, will force NATO to the negotiating table.
2. 목표: 2.1 Locate and destroy the American carrier.
3. 실행: 3.1 EMCON policy at your discretion. 3.2 Once enemy carrier is located, destroy using any means.
4. ENEMY OOB: 4.1 아이젠하워 전투단 4.1.1 1 x 니미츠 4.1.2 1 x 아이오와 4.1.3 1 x 타이콘데로가 4.1.4 다수의 호위 병력들
5. (기밀) FRIENDLY OOB: 5.1 키로프 타격 전단 5.1.1 키로프 RKR-181 5.1.2 Kronshtadt BPK-662 5.1.3 Bezuprechnyy EM-820 5.1.4 Vice-Admiral Kulakov BPK-401 5.1.5 키예프 TAVKR 5.2 Naval Aviation 5.2.1 12 x Tu-22M2 924th GuMRAP 5.2.1 12 x Tu-16K 987th MRAP 5.2.1 12 x MiG-25PD 445th IAP 5.3 K-209 (Pr.670M / 찰리-II)
6. (기밀) INTEL ASSESSMENT: 6.1 Satellite Kosmos 1932 will pass over Norwegian Sea at time 0028Z. However, Americans are attempting to shoot down our satellites. HQ will pass targeting data if possible. 6.2 US submarines likely escorting the carrier group
